response_body.Name: missedBinMessage
response_body.Value:
Disruption to garden waste service:
Garden waste collections have been cancelled this week (week commencing 30 June), due to the challenging conditions of the heatwave. If your collection is scheduled for this week, your next scheduled collection will be the week commencing Monday 14 July 2025. There is no need to report a missed collection this week and we will collect any excess waste on your next scheduled collection day.

response_body.Name: purchaseBinMessage
response_body.Value:
Service update
Due to operational difficulties our delivery service is temporarily suspended and containers will not be available to order until Monday 7th July at the earliest.

  • If you require a food caddy please bag your food waste and place in the green refuse bin until your order can be fulfilled.
  • If you require a black box for paper please present in a cardboard box or household storage box until your order can be fulfilled.

The Council's recycling sites are available for excess paper and cardboard.

response_body.Name: paymentSubmissionMessage
response_body.Value:
Before commencing, please ensure that you have your debit or credit card ready.

Once you have clicked 'Submit' you will be taken to our secure payment process provided by Access Paysuite services.

Please do not close this window or navigate away from this page. After submission, you will be provided with a case summary. If you interrupt the process, your payment may not be processed correctly.

Thank you

response_body.Value:

Access Paysuite services, our card payment supplier are experiencing issues which is affecting all of our payment forms.

Please note it may take approximately 30 seconds for your payment to be accepted. If you have a failed payment attempt, please check with your bank or card issuer first before trying again.

Your form information has been retained but we have not retained any card information.

response_body.Name: preferToSaveAppMessage
response_body.Value:
Would you prefer to complete your application in more than one sitting?

If you have a My Reigate&Banstead account, you can save your progress allowing you to re-visit the form later for completion.

Registering for an account is quick and easy and gives you access to a range of other council services all in one place. You can also view all of your historical activities.

Once you have logged into your account, access the form from our A-Z listing. This will enable you to click the 'Save' button at the bottom of the page at any time. You will receive a link via email that will enable you to continue where you left off.

Please note, we will keep your saved application for up to 30 days. If you do not finish your application within that time, it will be deleted and you will need to complete a brand new application.

Login into or register for a My Reigate&Banstead account

response_body.Name: preSubmissionSummaryMessage
response_body.Value:
Your request summary

Here is a summary of your request. If you need to make any changes, please click on the 'Previous' button, or if there are no changes, please click on 'Submit' at the bottom of the page.

response_body.Name: submission_summary_payment__end_AG
response_body.Value:
If you have provided an email address, you will shortly receive two emails:

  1. A copy of your submission.
  2. A receipt from e-paycapita.com. You should keep this for your records.

The details you have provided will be sent to the relevant department for actioning and they will be in touch in the near future, if required.

response_body.Name: paymentFormsDownMessage
response_body.Value:
We are currently experiencing issues with our online payment system.

For Council Tax, Parking fines or Invoices, you may use our telephone payments system by calling 01737 276100.

response_body.Name: form_unavailable__end
response_body.Value:
During this time, our Customer Contact Advisors will be unable to assist with form-related inquiries.

Please try again later, we apologise for any inconvenience.

env_tokens.missedBinMessage:
Disruption to garden waste service:
Garden waste collections have been cancelled this week (week commencing 30 June), due to the challenging conditions of the heatwave. If your collection is scheduled for this week, your next scheduled collection will be the week commencing Monday 14 July 2025. There is no need to report a missed collection this week and we will collect any excess waste on your next scheduled collection day.
env_tokens.purchaseBinMessage:
Service update
Due to operational difficulties our delivery service is temporarily suspended and containers will not be available to order until Monday 7th July at the earliest.

  • If you require a food caddy please bag your food waste and place in the green refuse bin until your order can be fulfilled.
  • If you require a black box for paper please present in a cardboard box or household storage box until your order can be fulfilled.

The Council's recycling sites are available for excess paper and cardboard.
env_tokens.automatedEmail: **This email was sent from a notification only address that cannot accept incoming e-mail. Please do not reply to this message as it will not be read or responded to.**

env_tokens.paymentSubmissionMessage:
Before commencing, please ensure that you have your debit or credit card ready.

Once you have clicked 'Submit' you will be taken to our secure payment process provided by Access Paysuite services.

Please do not close this window or navigate away from this page. After submission, you will be provided with a case summary. If you interrupt the process, your payment may not be processed correctly.

Thank you
env_tokens.paymentTemporaryMessage:
Payment system issues

Access Paysuite services, our card payment supplier are experiencing issues which is affecting all of our payment forms.

Please note it may take approximately 30 seconds for your payment to be accepted. If you have a failed payment attempt, please check with your bank or card issuer first before trying again.
env_tokens.paymentUnsuccessfulMessage:
Payment unsuccessful

No payment has been taken at this time.

There has been an error in validating your card details - please click through to the final tab, click the submit button and enter your payment details again. If the problem persists please contact your bank to investigate.

Your form information has been retained but we have not retained any card information.

env_tokens.preferToSaveAppMessage:
Would you prefer to complete your application in more than one sitting?

If you have a My Reigate&Banstead account, you can save your progress allowing you to re-visit the form later for completion.

Registering for an account is quick and easy and gives you access to a range of other council services all in one place. You can also view all of your historical activities.

Once you have logged into your account, access the form from our A-Z listing. This will enable you to click the 'Save' button at the bottom of the page at any time. You will receive a link via email that will enable you to continue where you left off.

Please note, we will keep your saved application for up to 30 days. If you do not finish your application within that time, it will be deleted and you will need to complete a brand new application.

Login into or register for a My Reigate&Banstead account
env_tokens.preSubmissionSummaryMessage:
Your request summary

Here is a summary of your request. If you need to make any changes, please click on the 'Previous' button, or if there are no changes, please click on 'Submit' at the bottom of the page.
env_tokens.submission_summary_payment__end_AG:
If you have provided an email address, you will shortly receive two emails:

  1. A copy of your submission.
  2. A receipt from e-paycapita.com. You should keep this for your records.

The details you have provided will be sent to the relevant department for actioning and they will be in touch in the near future, if required.
env_tokens.paymentFormsDownMessage:
We are currently experiencing issues with our online payment system.

For Council Tax, Parking fines or Invoices, you may use our telephone payments system by calling 01737 276100.
env_tokens.form_unavailable__end:
During this time, our Customer Contact Advisors will be unable to assist with form-related inquiries.

Please try again later, we apologise for any inconvenience.

env_tokens.missedBinMessage:
Disruption to garden waste service:
Garden waste collections have been cancelled this week (week commencing 30 June), due to the challenging conditions of the heatwave. If your collection is scheduled for this week, your next scheduled collection will be the week commencing Monday 14 July 2025. There is no need to report a missed collection this week and we will collect any excess waste on your next scheduled collection day.
env_tokens.purchaseBinMessage:
Service update
Due to operational difficulties our delivery service is temporarily suspended and containers will not be available to order until Monday 7th July at the earliest.

  • If you require a food caddy please bag your food waste and place in the green refuse bin until your order can be fulfilled.
  • If you require a black box for paper please present in a cardboard box or household storage box until your order can be fulfilled.

The Council's recycling sites are available for excess paper and cardboard.

env_tokens.preferToSaveAppMessage:
Would you prefer to complete your application in more than one sitting?

If you have a My Reigate&Banstead account, you can save your progress allowing you to re-visit the form later for completion.

Registering for an account is quick and easy and gives you access to a range of other council services all in one place. You can also view all of your historical activities.

Once you have logged into your account, access the form from our A-Z listing. This will enable you to click the 'Save' button at the bottom of the page at any time. You will receive a link via email that will enable you to continue where you left off.

Please note, we will keep your saved application for up to 30 days. If you do not finish your application within that time, it will be deleted and you will need to complete a brand new application.

Login into or register for a My Reigate&Banstead account
